## Summary

<!-- What changed, why, and the issue this closes. Example: Closes #123. -->

## Verification

<!-- List the commands and manual flows you ran. State anything you could not verify. -->

## Cavos integration feedback — required

Complete every prompt. If this issue does not touch Cavos, write `N/A` and say why.

### What worked as expected?

<!-- Include the SDK/API surface, docs, and setup steps that worked well. -->

### What failed, was unclear, or slowed you down?

<!-- Include errors, unexpected behavior, missing documentation, and workarounds. -->

### What would make Cavos easier to integrate?

<!-- Missing features, SDK improvements, APIs, examples, or documentation. -->

## Acceptance-criteria evidence — required

For every acceptance criterion in the linked issue, provide evidence below. Use
test output, screenshots, a short video, transaction hashes, or exact
reproduction steps. A criterion without evidence is not ready for review.

| Acceptance criterion | Evidence | How a reviewer can verify it |
| --- | --- | --- |
| | | |

## Contributor checklist

- [ ] I linked the issue this PR closes.
- [ ] I ran the relevant checks and reported their results above.
- [ ] I completed the Cavos integration feedback section, including explicit `N/A` rationale if applicable.
- [ ] I supplied evidence for every acceptance criterion.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, API keys, seed phrases, or `.env` files.
